what_is_already_known: Wong 2023 explicitly classifies 呢個用嚟切嘢 as an Instrumental SVC; several artifact examples are accepted in the limited pilot.
unresolved_question: Do respondents understand the preverbal NP as an instrument/resource, an object whose conventional function is described, or both?
instrument_requirement: Pair graded naturalness with a forced interpretation question; do not infer analysis from acceptability alone.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Determine whether the narrow node should be named and documented as instrumental, functional, or structurally underspecified.

what_is_already_known: The runtime admits broad NP/location slots and produces the narrow node for 香港用嚟切嘢 and 呢個問題用嚟切嘢.
unresolved_question: Which resource types are compatible with which predicates, and which rejections reflect semantic implausibility rather than syntax?
instrument_requirement: Use matched plausible and implausible pairings and a separate reason choice for grammar versus world knowledge.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Define an evidence-backed semantic review policy or keep semantic licensing outside the construction node.

what_is_already_known: The runtime produces the narrow node for method/example nouns when lexical coverage allows it; current sources mainly attest physical/spatial resources.
unresolved_question: Are methods, examples, rules, money, places, and other abstract entities ordinary resources in the same construction?
instrument_requirement: Counterbalance lexical classes instead of showing all resource types to every respondent.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Bound or broaden the resource class without ad hoc lexical lists.

what_is_already_known: The runtime excludes a lone person pronoun but often assigns a broad relation to person-headed NPs. The old pilot accepted 我用嚟切嘢, which can recover an omitted object.
unresolved_question: Is a person interpreted as the resource, as the user of an omitted resource, or only with special context?
instrument_requirement: Provide context and require an interpretation choice; never treat isolated naturalness as proof of person-resource licensing.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Protect omitted-resource readings from being mistaken for person-resource support.

what_is_already_known: The runtime routes 可以 and 係 profiles to broad IntendedFunctionRelation rather than the narrow node.
unresolved_question: Are modal affordance, copular definition, and bare direct-resource strings readings of one construction or separate constructions?
instrument_requirement: Use matched direct/modal/copular sets with the same lexical material and ask whether meaning changes.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Decide whether broad wrappers remain separate or share a lower structural relation.

what_is_already_known: Chor 2018 attests separate-user actual use; the CCO quotation includes broader 用嚟做咗 material. The runtime excludes aspect on 用 and routes perfective material in the second predicate to the broad relation.
unresolved_question: Does aspect distinguish actual use from conventional/intended function, and where may aspect occur?
instrument_requirement: Present contextually controlled habitual/function and completed-event readings; ask event interpretation as well as naturalness.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Prevent implementation-scoped exclusions from being described as language-wide ungrammaticality.

what_is_already_known: Chor 2018 attests 啲錢我用嚟買晒嗰堆嘢; the runtime routes separate-user strings to the broad relation.
unresolved_question: Does the overt user change only syntax/topic structure, or also the semantic relation?
instrument_requirement: Use resource-only and resource-plus-user matched conditions with interpretation questions.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Confirm the narrow direct-resource boundary while retaining the broader purposive construction.

what_is_already_known: The strongest direct natural quotation has coordinated predicates, but the runtime rejects explicit 同埋/或者 and only partially spans punctuation coordination.
unresolved_question: Which coordination forms belong inside one 用嚟 relation, and where should the construction span end?
instrument_requirement: Test natural coordination forms with stable lexical coverage; record the presented order and punctuation.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Either add a compositional coordinated-predicate path or document a deliberate parser limitation.

what_is_already_known: The isolated old-pilot item 呢個用嚟 split; its interpretation depends on prior discourse.
unresolved_question: When can the second predicate be omitted, and what context licenses the omission?
instrument_requirement: Use explicit preceding questions/statements and compare licensed versus unlicensed contexts.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Keep predicate omission out of the narrow node unless context licensing is represented.

what_is_already_known: Cheung 2018 and Chor 2018 analyze 嚟 as a purposive linker in broader V1 + 嚟 + V2 structures.
unresolved_question: What makes 用嚟 a conventionalized subpattern rather than simply one lexical instance of general purposive 嚟?
instrument_requirement: Interleave ordinary instrumental 用 + NP + V, general V1 + 嚟 + V2, and 用嚟 conditions as unrelated-looking contrasts.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Avoid collapsing the broader purposive-linker system into the narrow resource node.

what_is_already_known: The runtime produces the narrow node for 呢個用嚟做咩㗎; this asks function directly and may be semantically clearer than declaratives.
unresolved_question: Do function questions and declaratives share the same relation and resource constraints?
instrument_requirement: Use matched question/answer contexts and avoid exposing construction labels.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Determine whether question forms can provide cleaner evidence for the resource-function reading.

what_is_already_known: The runtime treats 主要 and 平時 differently before 用嚟, producing a broad relation for one and the narrow node for the other.
unresolved_question: Which preverbal adverbs modify the resource NP, 用嚟 relation, or whole clause?
instrument_requirement: Use a small matched adverb set only after lexical and context review.
parser_consequence_if_resolved: Prevent adverbs from being absorbed into the resource span and define attachment boundaries.
